title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.241 - Judicial review
text:
210.241.  Judicial review. — Any person aggrieved by a final decision of the department of elementary and secondary education made in the administration of sections 210.201 to 210.245 shall be entitled to judicial review thereof as provided in chapter 536.
(L. 1955 p. 685 § 210.240, A.L. 1993 H.B. 376, A.L. 2022 S.B. 683)
